title: Broadcast - Ultimate
description: A powerful Minecraft plugin to send custom broadcasts on-screen, in chat, on action bar, on boss bar, or with countdown timers.
body:
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3425ba0c13f5b60fe3773e73adc9525d4ccc83bf_0.webp)

# 📢 ULTIMATE BROADCAST — Advanced Broadcast & Countdown System

**ULTIMATE BROADCAST is a modern, GUI-based broadcast plugin designed for Paper/Spigot servers that need more than simple chat messages.
It provides powerful title broadcasts, live countdown timers, preset messages, and relative-time scheduling, all managed safely through an intuitive in-game GUI.**

**Built with performance, clarity, and configurability in mind.**

## ✨ GUI Management System

**Intuitive menu for managing broadcasts, presets, and schedules
Easy-to-use interface for server administrators**

## 📢 Multiple Broadcast Types

**Send messages as titles, subtitles, or chat messages
Target broadcasts to specific players or entire worlds
Full player support**

## ⏰ Advanced Scheduling

**Schedule broadcasts to send at any future time
Use flexible time formats (5s, 10m, 2h, 1d)
Automatic execution of scheduled announcements**

## ⏱️ Dynamic Timers

**ActionBar countdown timers
Customizable BossBar timers with color and style options
Schedule timers to start at specific times**

## 🎯 Preset Management

**Create and manage broadcast presets
Store frequently used messages for quick deployment
Edit presets directly through commands or GUI**

## 🎨 Message Formatting

**Support for legacy color codes (&a, &c, etc.)
MiniMessage support for advanced formatting
Customizable welcome messages on player join**

## ⚙️ Control

**Pause/resume all broadcasts instantly
Complete permission system with granular control
Comprehensive command help and feedback
Hot-reload configuration**

## 💻 Commands

### Send Broadcasts

| Command                                      | Description                      |
| -------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------- |
| /ubroadcast send title <message>             | Send message as a title           |
| /ubroadcast send subtitle <message>          | Send message as a subtitle        |
| /ubroadcast send player <player> <message>   | Send message to a specific player |
| /ubroadcast send world <world> <message>     | Send message to a specific world  |
| /ubroadcast send preset <id>                 | Send a saved broadcast preset     |

### Schedule Broadcasts

| Command                                           | Description                   |
| ------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------- |
| /ubroadcast schedule title after <time> <message>    | Schedule a title broadcast    |
| /ubroadcast schedule subtitle after <time> <message> | Schedule a subtitle broadcast |

### Timers (ActionBar)

| Command                                                                     | Description                        |
| --------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------- |
| /ubroadcast timer actionbar start <duration> <message>                      | Start ActionBar countdown timer    |
| /ubroadcast timer actionbar schedule after <time> for <duration> <message> | Schedule ActionBar countdown timer |

### Timers (BossBar)

| Command                                                                  | Description                      |
| ------------------------------------------------------------------------ | -------------------------------- |
| /ubroadcast timer bossbar start <duration> <message>                     | Start BossBar countdown timer    |
| /ubroadcast timer bossbar schedule after <time> for <duration> <message> | Schedule BossBar countdown timer |

### Preset Manager

| Command                     | Description      |
| --------------------------- | ---------------- |
| `/ubroadcast preset add`    | Add new preset   |
| `/ubroadcast preset remove` | Remove preset    |
| `/ubroadcast preset list`   | List all presets |

### Control

| Command              | Description          |
| -------------------- | -------------------- |
| `/ubroadcast pause`  | Pause all broadcasts |
| `/ubroadcast resume` | Resume broadcasts    |
| `/ubroadcast toggle` | Toggle pause state   |
| `/ubroadcast reload` | Reload configuration |
| `/ubroadcast help`   | Show help            |

### Server Ip

| Broadcast Plugin              | Server          |
| -------------------- | -------------------- |
| This Plugin is available in this server   | play.hydraz.online            |
